_comment: DZOFILM - cinema lens partner. We've already shot with their glass (see global work panel 'DZOFILM Field Test'), so this deck leans on a proven track record rather than a cold pitch. FFM facts live in data/global.json.
name: DZOFILM

meta.title: Focus Finder Media - DZOFILM Partnership Deck
meta.description: A scroll-driven look at the DZOFILM x Focus Finder Media partnership.

challenge.label: The Challenge
challenge.heading:
Anyone can show a lens.
Few can show what it sees.

nodes.d: Glass tested on location, not in a studio
Color rendition, contrast, and character that read on screen
A full set that covers a story, not just one shot
Durable enough for back-to-back field days
Footage that performs, not just footage that exists

challenge.quote: "A spec sheet tells you what a lens can do. Footage from the field tells you what it actually feels like. That's the difference an audience notices."

solution.label: The Proof
solution.heading:
We've already shot
on DZOFILM glass.
solution.sub: Our first field test with DZOFILM cinema lenses became one of our best-performing pieces of gear content: real footage, real conditions, and an audience that responded. This partnership builds on that, not from a pitch deck, but from a deck of footage that already exists.

spokes.s: Shot during an active expedition, not a controlled set
Wide, standard, and long focal lengths in one kit
A look that holds up against bigger-budget glass
820K views on the first piece alone

solution.line2: The next chapter isn't a test anymore. It's a full expedition built around the lineup, with the kind of coverage that turns DZOFILM from a name in the credits into the reason the footage looks the way it does.

partnership.heading: The first field test was the pitch. This is the follow-through.
paragraphs: DZOFILM glass already has a track record with our audience: a single field test reached 820K views with strong engagement and retention, all organic, no paid promotion. That's not a projection, it's a result.

The next step is deeper integration: DZOFILM as the primary glass on our next expedition, with creator-led BTS, lens-specific breakdowns, and long-form cinematic work that shows the full range of the lineup in real conditions.

flow.s: Shared live, and built into films

finalAsk.heading:
One field test got
820K views.
Let's see what a full expedition does.
finalAsk.paragraph: Focus Finder Media already proved DZOFILM glass performs in front of our audience. Now let's build the next chapter around it, fully, from first frame to final cut.
